idea-plugin.name: Private Notes
idea-plugin.description:
Private Notes source code and document
You are still afraid to add "sensitive comments" to the project
Is the source code a read-only file and can't add comments
  • Anywhere you want to add comments, press Alt + enter mouse out and click to save
  • There are private comments. Press Alt + enter to delete them
  • Alt + p you can quickly add or edit private notes
  • Alt + o show other actions for private notes
  • right click menuprivate notesview actions

    • synchronous operation

  • The synchronization operation data are cached in the current user directory In the privatenotes folder, if you need to synchronize, you can use the powerful GIT
  • Right-click private comments to use common Git commands

    • Private Notes 源码和文档
    你还在为项目中不敢添加 "敏感注释"!
    源码是只读文件不能添加注释而烦恼吗？
  • 在任何你想加注释的地方 按下Alt + Enter鼠标移出点击即可保存
  • 已有私人注释 按下Alt + Enter即可快速编辑
  • Alt + p 可快速添加或者编辑私人注释
  • Alt + o 展示私人注释的其它操作
  • 右键菜单私人注释查看操作

    • 同步操作

  • 数据都缓存当前用户目录下的 .privateNotes文件夹中,如需同步，可以借助强大的Git
  • 右键私人注释 可使用常用Git命令
idea-plugin.change-notes:
v1.8.11 update

  • publish a clean release after correcting the mis-tagged v1.8.10 release flow
  • keep the 1.8.9 MD5 compatibility fix in the correctly tagged release build

v1.8.10 update

  • publish a clean GitHub release after correcting the mis-tagged v1.8.9 release flow
  • keep the MD5 compatibility fix and release automation in a correctly versioned build

v1.8.9 update

  • replace unstable Hutool 16-char MD5 calls with a controlled MD5 implementation
  • avoid legacy git note lookup failures from breaking note availability checks

v1.8.8 update

  • add GitHub release workflow to build and publish plugin zip artifacts automatically
  • document GitHub release downloads and changelog for repository distribution

v1.8.7 update

  • show the hover note viewer for all private notes, not only truncated ones
  • keep the same interactive scrollable viewer for full and shortened inline notes

v1.8.6 update

  • replace hover note popup container with an independent interactive window
  • avoid IntelliJ IDEA 2025 lightweight hover popup limitations when selecting note text

v1.8.5 update

  • replace the hover note tooltip body with a scrollable editor-style text box
  • keep hover popup open while selecting note text inside the editor-style viewer

v1.8.4 update

  • keep the hover popup alive while clicking inside it to select note text
  • request focus for the note text area on click so selection and copy work reliably

v1.8.3 update

  • allow selecting and copying text from the private note hover popup
  • support Cmd/Ctrl+C, Cmd/Ctrl+A and right-click copy in the hover popup

v1.8.2 update

  • avoid runtime failure when editor actions query notes for files without readable local content
  • gracefully skip note lookup when the source file is missing and no content bytes are available

v1.8.1 update

  • show detailed path migration report with migrated and skipped file entries
  • display path migration result in a scrollable dialog

v1.8.0 update

  • store canonical source file path metadata in note files
  • use canonical absolute path hash as the primary note storage key
  • add settings-based path prefix migration for moved projects
  • keep compatibility with legacy storage and previous git-aware storage

v1.7.1 update

  • use git-root-hash plus repo-relative-path-hash for note storage when the file is inside a git repository
  • fallback to canonical file path hash when the file is outside git
  • keep compatibility with both legacy storage and 1.7.0 path-hash storage

v1.7.0 update

  • isolate note storage by source file path to avoid collisions between same-name files
  • auto-migrate legacy note files to the new storage layout on first access
  • fix line relocation direction during multi-line replace and rollback
  • relocate notes using before/after file content when external content changes happen

v1.6.4 update

  • increase default hover popup close delay to 3000ms
  • re-check pointer position before closing hover popup to avoid premature dismissal

v1.6.3 update

  • add configurable hover popup close delay with 1500ms default
  • keep hover popup alive long enough to move the pointer into it

v1.6.2 update

  • make private note hover popup scrollable for long content
  • allow moving the pointer into the popup to scroll its content

v1.6.1 update

  • fix private note hover popup crash on IntelliJ IDEA 2025
  • show full private note content with editor popup instead of awt tooltip

v1.6 update

  • support IntelliJ IDEA 2025 platform
  • fix input method candidate popup in note editor
  • reduce editor lag caused by hot path file IO

v1.5 update

  • fix some bugs
  • add Git operate

v1.4.2 update

  • add esc key to close balloon
  • fix some bugs

v1.4.1 update

  • fix some bugs

v1.4 update

  • auto wrap

v1.3 update

  • update operation
  • add shortcut keys
  • add right click menu

v1.2 update

  • fix bug
  • optimize performance

v1.1 update

  • modify input box size
  • add copy note
  • fix some bugs

v1.0 first version

  • add private notes

action.description: 添加/编辑 私人注释
